news.title:
IRB reports 22% YoY toll revenue rise in Feb '26, reaching Rs.746 Cr.
Growth driven by traffic and new asset; uplift expected with future additions.
news.summary:
IRB reports 22% YoY toll revenue rise in Feb '26, reaching Rs.746 Cr.
Growth driven by traffic and new asset; uplift expected with future additions.

news.title:
IRB Infra secures ₹3.75B arbitral award against NHAI.
Concession period extended by 582.8 days after arbitration.
news.summary:
IRB Infra secures ₹3.75B arbitral award against NHAI.

news.title: IRB Holding, promoter of IRB Infra, acquired 1.5M shares on Feb 25-26.
news.summary: IRB Holding, promoter of IRB Infra, acquired 1.5M shares on Feb 25-26.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd releases earnings call transcript per SEBI Regulation 30.
The transcript, from February 16, 2026, is now available on the company's website.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd releases earnings call transcript per SEBI Regulation 30.
The transcript, from February 16, 2026, is now available on the company's website.

news.title:
CLSA maintains outperform rating on IRB Infra with a target of ₹69.
Target lowered due to reduced EPC expectations from fewer construction-heavy contracts.
news.summary:
CLSA maintains outperform rating on IRB Infra with a target of ₹69.
Target lowered due to reduced EPC expectations from fewer construction-heavy contracts.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure released Q3FY26 earnings call audio, per SEBI norms.
Audio available on company website, offering insights into management discussion.
news.summary:

news.title: IRB Infra shares declined nearly 5% after weak Q3 results.
news.summary: IRB Infra shares declined nearly 5% after weak Q3 results.

news.title:
IRB Infra projects asset base growth to Rs.1.14 lakh crores by 2030.
Company targets 25% profit CAGR by 2030 for sustained growth.
news.summary:
IRB Infra projects asset base growth to Rs.1.14 lakh crores by 2030.
Company targets 25% profit CAGR by 2030 for sustained growth.

news.title:
IRB Infra plans to operate and transfer 3-4 toll projects from Jan-Mar.
This move marks a notable operational shift for the company.
news.summary:
IRB Infra plans to operate and transfer 3-4 toll projects from Jan-Mar.
This move marks a notable operational shift for the company.

news.title:
IRB Infra reports Q3 EBITDA of 10.2B INR, up from 9.8B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin rises to 54.6% from 48.6% YoY.
news.summary:
IRB Infra reports Q3 EBITDA of 10.2B INR, up from 9.8B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin rises to 54.6% from 48.6% YoY.

news.title: IRB Infrastructure Developers approves 1:1 bonus share issuance, offering one additional share per owned share.
news.summary: IRB Infrastructure Developers approves 1:1 bonus share issuance, offering one additional share per owned share.

news.title:
IRB Infra approved Q3 & 9M FY26 results, declared Rs 0.07/share interim dividend.
Proposed share capital hike to Rs 1260 cr; TOT 18 project worth Rs 1582 cr approved.
news.summary:
IRB Infra approved Q3 & 9M FY26 results, declared Rs 0.07/share interim dividend.
Proposed share capital hike to Rs 1260 cr; TOT 18 project worth Rs 1582 cr approved.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd to announce Q3 & 9M FY26 results on Feb 13, 2026.
Earnings call scheduled on Feb 16, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. IST; details on www.irb.co.in.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure Developers Ltd to announce Q3 & 9M FY26 results on Feb 13, 2026.
Earnings call scheduled on Feb 16, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. IST; details on www.irb.co.in.

news.title:
IRB Infra's toll revenue rose 15% YoY in Jan 2026 to Rs. 750 Cr.
Traffic growth remains strong; new toll collection began on Jan 23, 2026.
news.summary:
IRB Infra's toll revenue rose 15% YoY in Jan 2026 to Rs. 750 Cr.

news.title:
IRB Infra's board to discuss bonus issue and interim dividend on 13 Feb 2026.
The meeting will consider the third interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
news.summary:
IRB Infra's board to discuss bonus issue and interim dividend on 13 Feb 2026.
The meeting will consider the third interim dividend for FY 2025-26.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Trust updates on TOT-18 project, involving a Concession Agreement with NHAI for NH-16 section.
The Chandikhole-Bhadrak section (Km 62-136.5) in Odisha will be managed under Toll Operate and Transfer mode.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure Trust updates on TOT-18 project, involving a Concession Agreement with NHAI for NH-16 section.
The Chandikhole-Bhadrak section (Km 62-136.5) in Odisha will be managed under Toll Operate and Transfer mode.

news.title:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.
news.summary:
Key stocks to watch: Infosys, PB Fintech, Tata Power, Coal India, Bharti Airtel, City Union Bank, IRB Infra.
Earnings highlights: PB Fintech Q3 revenue rose 37.1%, net profit up 164%; Tata Chemicals Q3 revenue fell 1.1%, net loss Rs 93 crore.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure Developers completed the Gandeva Ena Ham project transfer, receiving ₹513 crores from equity investment.
The company plans to reduce its consolidated debt by approximately ₹700 crores.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure Developers completed the Gandeva Ena Ham project transfer, receiving ₹513 crores from equity investment.
The company plans to reduce its consolidated debt by approximately ₹700 crores.

news.title:
IRB Infrastructure transfers VM7 Expressway to IRB InvIT Fund for INR 513 Cr.
The deal reduces IRB's consolidated debt by INR 700 Cr and supports growth.
news.summary:
IRB Infrastructure transfers VM7 Expressway to IRB InvIT Fund for INR 513 Cr.
The deal reduces IRB's consolidated debt by INR 700 Cr and supports growth.

news.title:
Budget 2026 focuses on road stocks like L&T, Dilip Buildcon, IRB Infra, and PNC Infratech, despite 8.4% lower capex of Rs 10.2L cr.
Govt targets 26,000 km High-Speed Corridor by FY33; digital tools, stricter norms, and PPP projects aim to boost logistics efficiency.
news.summary:
Budget 2026 focuses on road stocks like L&T, Dilip Buildcon, IRB Infra, and PNC Infratech, despite 8.4% lower capex of Rs 10.2L cr.
Govt targets 26,000 km High-Speed Corridor by FY33; digital tools, stricter norms, and PPP projects aim to boost logistics efficiency.
